name: adv-flaky-no-inference
notes: Implementations MUST NOT infer flakiness from a two-run alternation. A gitignored state file makes the test fail on its first execution and pass on its second, with the source tree byte-identical across both runs. veridelta reports the factual two-run transition -- repaired_same_surface (test/config digests unchanged) with outcome improved -- and attaches NO flaky label. The state file is ignored, so it triggers no verification_surface event.
